name: Chicken Pasta Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the macaroni according to package instructions.
2. Add the snow peas and cook for an additional 2 minutes after the macaroni is done cooking.
3. In a separate bowl, mix together the mayonnaise and French dressing.
4. Combine the cooked macaroni, peas, and chicken in the bowl with the mayo and dressing mixture.
5. Stir until all ingredients are well combined.
6. Serve the salad.
